nodes.label: Provider-agnostic representation of a single inbound email.
Pick the first address from a comma- or semicolon-separated header.
Normalise various header shapes into a flat ``{name: value}`` dict.
Strip surrounding angle brackets from a Message-ID header.
Parse a SendGrid Inbound-Parse multipart/form-data payload.
Parse a Postmark inbound JSON payload.
Parse an AWS SES inbound notification delivered via SNS.      SNS payload struct
If a signing key is configured, verify the X-Webhook-Signature header.      Skip
Receive an inbound email reply from any of: SendGrid Inbound Parse,     Postmark
Locate the OutreachThread this inbound email is a reply to.      Match priority:
Return True if this inbound message has already been processed.
Recompute ``reply_rate`` and ``acquisition_rate`` for one campaign.      Returns
Look up the matching thread, update DB, write audit log, return 200.
